headline: What Mosaic (MOS)'s Q1 Loss and Pulled Phosphate Outlook Means For Shareholders
summary: Earlier this month, The Mosaic Company reported first-quarter 2026 results showing sales of US$2,998 million but a net loss of US$257.6 million, reversing a profit a year earlier, and issued updated production and pricing guidance for its key potash and phosphate segments. A particularly important development was Mosaic’s decision to withdraw full-year 2026 phosphate production guidance as it reassesses operating rates amid shifting raw material markets, highlighting increased uncertainty...
